ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up; Pos
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Self-Represented Plaintiff MUSHA MUHAMMAD DIRBAS, dba KENNEDY LIQUOR AND MARKET present in court.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SHANTE KYER.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Musha Muhammad Dirbas sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $8,700.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $650.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $9,350.00
Judgment signed in open court.
